GSPC.json.note: real Yahoo response for ^GSPC (URL-encoded as %5EGSPC); range=5d returned 5 trading days; recorded mid-session (regularMarketPrice == close[-1])

AAPL.json.note: real Yahoo response for AAPL; same 5d shape

INVALID.json.note: synthetic — Yahoo's documented not-found error shape: chart.result null + chart.error populated
